text: I think there is a project that explores that translation <https://x.com/moenig/status/1601890041499996161?s=20|https://x.com/moenig/status/1601890041499996161?s=20>

attachments.fallback: X (formerly Twitter): Jens Mönig (@moenig) on X
attachments.text: Did you know that since a decade ago Snap! can translate blocks to any textual grammar? I’m now experimenting with backmapping arbitrary grammars to identify blocks from text code. Just now went live on a line-of-code basis: <https://t.co/lLMGD1c1dY>
attachments.title: Jens Mönig (@moenig) on X

elements.text: I think there is a project that explores that translation
